hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'site-packages/sisepuede' && echo 'BLOCKED: Never modify sisepuede package. Fix via CSV inputs only.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'apply_step' && [ -f ssp_modeling/input_data/df_input_0.csv ] && cp ssp_modeling/input_data/df_input_0.csv ssp_modeling/input_data/df_input_0.csv.bak_$(date +%H%M%S) && echo 'Backup: df_input_0.csv.bak_'$(date +%H%M%S) || true

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'run_calibration0' && pgrep -f 'julia.*nemomod\|julia.*NemoMod' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'BLOCKED: Julia/NemoMod already running. Wait for it to finish.' >&2 && exit 2 || true
CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'run_calibration0' && echo 'REMINDER: Run compare_to_inventory.py on the output' || true

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'apply_step' && python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv('ssp_modeling/input_data/df_input_0.csv'); n_nan=df.isna().sum().sum(); n_inf=sum(1 for c in df.select_dtypes('number').columns if df[c].apply(lambda x: isinstance(x,float) and abs(x)==float('inf')).any()); print(f'Validation: inf={n_inf}, NaN={n_nan}') if n_nan>0 or n_inf>0 else print('Validation: clean')" 2>/dev/null || true

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'apply_step' && python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv('ssp_modeling/input_data/df_input_0.csv'); msp=[c for c in df.columns if 'frac_min_share_production' in c]; s=df[msp].iloc[0].sum(); eff=[c for c in df.columns if 'efficfactor_entc' in c]; bad_eff=[c for c in eff if df[c].iloc[0]<0 or df[c].iloc[0]>1]; print(f'MSP sum: {s:.3f}'+(' WARNING >0.95!' if s>0.95 else ' OK')); print(f'Efficiency bounds: {len(bad_eff)} outside [0,1]') if bad_eff else None" 2>/dev/null || true

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'apply_step' && python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv('ssp_modeling/input_data/df_input_0.csv'); frac_cols=[c for c in df.columns if c.startswith('frac_')]; groups={}; [groups.setdefault('_'.join(c.split('_')[:-1]),set()).add(c) for c in frac_cols]; bad=[]; [bad.append((pfx,df[list(cols)].sum(axis=1).min(),df[list(cols)].sum(axis=1).max())) for pfx,cols in groups.items() if len(cols)>1 and not df[list(cols)].sum(axis=1).between(0.99,1.01).all()]; print(f'Fraction groups: {len(bad)} broken') if bad else print('Fraction groups: all OK'); [print(f'  {b[0]}: sum={b[1]:.4f}-{b[2]:.4f}') for b in bad[:3]]" 2>/dev/null || true

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'run_calibration0' && python3 -c "import glob,pandas as pd; runs=sorted(glob.glob('ssp_modeling/ssp_run_output/calibration_*')); [exit() for _ in [1] if len(runs)<2]; new=pd.read_csv(runs[-1]+'/diagnostics/diff_report.csv') if __import__('os').path.exists(runs[-1]+'/diagnostics/diff_report.csv') else exit(); old=pd.read_csv(runs[-2]+'/diagnostics/diff_report.csv') if __import__('os').path.exists(runs[-2]+'/diagnostics/diff_report.csv') else exit(); m=new.merge(old,on='ID',suffixes=('_new','_old')); m['regr']=m['diff_new'].abs()-m['diff_old'].abs(); bad=m[m['regr']>0.5]; print('REGRESSIONS:') if len(bad)>0 else print('No regressions >0.5 MtCO2e'); [print(f'  {r["ID"]}: +{r["regr"]:.2f} MtCO2e') for _,r in bad.head(5).iterrows()]" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ "$(basename "$FILE")" = 'CLAUDE.md' ] && CHARS=$(wc -c < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null) && [ "$CHARS" -gt 40000 ] && echo "WARNING: CLAUDE.md is $CHARS chars (>40k threshold)" || true

LATEST=$(ls -td ssp_modeling/ssp_run_output/calibration_* 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -f "$LATEST/diagnostics/diff_report.csv" ] && python3 -c "import pandas as pd; d=pd.read_csv('$LATEST/diagnostics/diff_report.csv'); s=d[d['inventory'].abs()>0.01]; print(f'Last calibration: {s["diff"].abs().sum():.1f} MtCO2e | {(s["error_pct"]<=15).sum()}/{len(s)} within 15%')" 2>/dev/null || echo 'No previous calibration run found'
